reviews.comment:
La veces que he parado buena atención de los playeros, vamos limpios. Solo faltaría actualizar el mini shop. Lo demás bien

(Translated by Google)
The times I've stopped, the staff have been very helpful, and we're always clean. They just need to update the mini-shop. Otherwise, it's fine.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que vamos de Bs. As. a Santiago o visceversa hacemos esta parada, es lamentable los baños un asco nunca hay papel higiénico y no hay higiene, el café con leche que sirven no es agradable, la atención de los empleados buena.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we travel from Buenos Aires to Santiago or vice versa, we make this stop. It's deplorable; the bathrooms are disgusting, there's never any toilet paper, and there's no hygiene. The coffee with milk they serve isn't pleasant, but the staff are friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlcU96ZUNnEAE
